home.heroDescription: Reviving the spirit of Daan, Jeev Seva and Sanatan values through meaningful products.
home.mission: Moksh Ganga is a purpose-driven, spiritually rooted venture dedicated to social welfare and inspired living. We help modern families reconnect with compassion, Daan, Jeev Seva and Sanatan Dharma through simple, meaningful products.
home.featuredDescription: Daan Kit is a spiritually inspired product created to help devotees perform meaningful acts of Jeev Seva and Daan. The current kit supports Chinti Aahar Daan and is prepared with vegetarian ingredients and traditional values.

why.title: Sanatan Inspired
why.text: Rooted in timeless Indian traditions and daily spiritual discipline.

why.title: Social Welfare
why.text: Designed to make compassionate action simple for families and devotees.

why.title: Pure & Natural
why.text: Prepared with vegetarian ingredients and careful intention.

why.title: Meaningful Daan
why.text: A gentle way to turn devotion into positive action.

about.title: Our Story
about.intro: Moksh Ganga began with a simple belief: spiritual values become powerful when they are practiced with care in everyday life.
about.story: From Haridwar, close to the sacred flow of Maa Ganga, we are building a modern social enterprise that helps people perform Daan and Jeev Seva with dignity, devotion and clarity. Our work is inspired by Sanatan Dharma, compassion and the shared responsibility of serving life around us.
about.vision: To become India’s trusted spiritual social enterprise for meaningful products that support Daan, Seva and inspired living.
about.mission: To reconnect modern society with compassion, Daan, Jeev Seva and Sanatan values through accessible, thoughtful products.

products.title: Products
products.intro: Simple, spiritually inspired products for devotees, families and social welfare supporters.

daanKit.title: Daan Kit
daanKit.intro: A simple and meaningful way to perform Jeev Seva and Daan.
daanKit.what: Daan Kit is a thoughtfully prepared Chinti Aahar Daan kit made with vegetarian ingredients and guided by traditional values. It is created for devotees who want an easy, respectful way to practice Daan.
daanKit.why: Daan is an act of humility, gratitude and care. Through small acts of Jeev Seva, families can nurture compassion and connect daily life with Sanatan values.
steps: Choose a clean and safe outdoor place.
Offer a small quantity with prayerful intention.
Repeat regularly as a simple practice of Seva.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.text: A thoughtful concept for families who want to make Daan part of daily life.

items.name: Rahul Joshi
items.text: The idea feels rooted, simple and very relevant for Haridwar devotees.

items.name: Meena Rawat
items.text: Moksh Ganga brings spiritual practice into everyday compassion.

faq.question: Is Daan Kit available now?
faq.answer: Yes. Daan Kit is available now for enquiries through WhatsApp and phone.

faq.question: Is this an ecommerce website?
faq.answer: No. At this stage, Moksh Ganga accepts enquiries through WhatsApp, calls and the contact form.

faq.question: Where is Moksh Ganga based?
faq.answer: Moksh Ganga is based in Haridwar, Uttarakhand, India.
